name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BraceForImpactHelper.GsFricMask1
summary: Glancing spin help. Two character body-masking value, bitwise joint mask or bitwise logic string of two character body-masking value  (see notes for explanation). Note gsFricMask1 and gsFricMask2 are made independent by the code so you can have fb for gsFricMask1 but gsFricScale1 will not be applied to any body parts in gsFricMask2.
